arts.ttl: Interest from Manchester United, Real Madrid and Saudi Arabia in Alphonso Davies could complicate things for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: After nearly a year of reports that claimed an agreement between Real Madrid and wantaway Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies at the end of the latter’s contract was inevitable, Bayern fans were recently treated to some very different news. Florian Plettenberg continues to claim the club is optimistic in its’ pursuit to renew Davies, but threw a curveball in a surprise new contender for the treble winner’s services:

arts.ttl: Shakhtar Donetsk vs Bayern Munich: Live stream, game time thread, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: Missing nine players, who will step up for Bayern Munich? In stoppage time, Shakhtar gets caught pressing high and Joshua Kimmich puts a ball over the top to Arijon Ibrahimović, who dribbles around the keeper.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl downplays the notion that Bayern Munich is too dependent on Jamal Musiala; uses Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo as examples
arts.sum: For Bayern sporting director Max Eberl, he referred to FC Barcelona and Real Madrid when they had Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo respectively as parallels. “Remember Lionel Messi at Barcelona and Cristiano Ronaldo at Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Report: Leroy Sané willing to take pay cut for Bayern Munich, but execs want to see more
arts.sum: While the Germany international is willing to take a pay cut to stay in Bavaria in an attempt to win more trophies, the club executives have not seen enough from Sané to warrant another long-term deal...yet: The player would like to stay and is ready to take a pay cut as he feels very comfortable in the team and wants to win the Champions League with Bayern.

arts.ttl: Daniel Peretz reveals idol Manuel Neuer “wished me luck” before the Heidenheim game
arts.sum: However, due to a personal leave from Ulreich and Manuel Neuer’s rib injury, the Israeli goalkeeper started his first Bundesliga game for Bayern against FC Heidenheim. Signed during the 2023 transfer window, Daniel Peretz has since struggled to get game time at Bayern Munich as third choice goalkeeper behind Manuel Neuer and Sven Ulreich.

arts.ttl: January could be the turning point in Real Madrid’s pursuit of Alphonso Davies and Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Rumours of Real Madrid looking to bolster their wing-back positions with the signings of Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies and Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold have been a major talking point for months.…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend out until 2025 with broken rib
arts.sum: Manuel Neuer will miss the rest of 2024 after the Bayern Munich goalkeeper suffered a broken rib.

arts.ttl: No Fear: Shakhtar Donetsk not intimidated by Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Shakhtar Donetsk defender Mykola Matviyenko is going to have one of the hardest jobs on the pitch when his squad takes on Bayern Munich in the Champions League later today. Yes, we know that Bayern are probably one of the best teams in the world: they play very serious football, have very powerful players in every position.
Tom Bischof has insisted that he is not distracted by the speculation linking him with Bayern Munich, among other clubs.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies can sign Man Utd contract in January
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies will not sign a new Bayern Munich deal before the end of the year, meaning Manchester United will have a shot at signing the Canada superstar on a pre-contract in January. This means that Man Utd will legally have a shot at opening negotiations with Davies from January and convincing the left back to sign a pre-contract that would see him arrive on a Bosman Transfer in July.
